nodes.name: analyst

nodes.name: architect
nodes.summary: BMAD architect agent definition for technical architecture design, system design decisions, and ADR creation

nodes.summary: BMAD orchestrator agent for coordinating multi-agent workflows, delegating tasks to specialist agents based on context

nodes.name: dev
nodes.summary: BMAD developer agent definition for implementing user stories, writing code, and following coding standards

nodes.name: pm
nodes.summary: BMAD product manager agent for creating PRDs, defining requirements, and managing product backlog

nodes.name: po
nodes.summary: BMAD product owner agent for story validation, acceptance criteria definition, and sprint planning

nodes.name: qa
nodes.summary: BMAD QA agent for test planning, quality assurance, bug identification, and story acceptance validation

nodes.name: sm
nodes.summary: BMAD scrum master agent for sprint facilitation, process improvement, and team coordination

nodes.name: ux-expert
nodes.summary: BMAD UX expert agent for user experience design, frontend specifications, and usability guidance
